title: koanophyllon flexilis
intro: Koanophyllon flexilis, also known as 'Guaco', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Central America and Mexico. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to its saponin content. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Koanophyllon flexilis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
